title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Zingiber officinale, also known as ginger, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The oil's active compounds, such as gingerol and shogaol, inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to periodontal disease, including Porphyromonas gingivalis and Streptococcus mutans. Additionally, the oil's anti-inflammatory properties reduce swelling and pain associated with periodontal disease, promoting health...
